targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    w.plantname,
    w.year,
    w.total_dayIrradiation,
    pi.Dccapacity,
    g.total_generation,
    w.Expected_Energy
FROM (
    SELECT
        ws.plantid,
        ws.plantname,
        DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(ws.createddate + 86400), '%Y') AS year,
        SUM(ws.dayIrradiation) AS total_dayIrradiation,
        SUM(ws.dayIrradiation * (pi.Dccapacity * 1000)) AS Expected_Energy
    FROM weatherstation ws
    INNER JOIN plantinfo pi
        ON ws.plantid = pi.plantid
    WHERE ws.plantid = $plant_name
    GROUP BY ws.plantid, ws.plantname, year, pi.Dccapacity
) w
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
        ig.plantid,
        ig.plantname,
        DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(ig.createddate + 86400), '%Y') AS year,
        SUM(CAST(REPLACE(ig.daygeneration, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_generation
    FROM invgeneration ig
    WHERE ig.plantid = $plant_name
    GROUP BY ig.plantid, ig.plantname, year
) g
ON w.plantid = g.plantid AND w.year = g.year
INNER JOIN plantinfo pi
ON w.plantid = pi.plantid
ORDER BY w.plantname, w.year;

SELECT
    w.plantname,
    w.month,
    pi.Dccapacity,
    w.total_dayIrradiation,
    g.total_generation,
    w.Expected_Energy
FROM (
    SELECT
        ws.plantid,
        ws.plantname,
        DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(ws.createddate + 86400), '%Y-%m') AS month,
        SUM(ws.dayIrradiation) AS total_dayIrradiation,
        SUM(ws.dayIrradiation * (pi.Dccapacity * 1000)) AS Expected_Energy
    FROM weatherstation ws
    INNER JOIN plantinfo pi
        ON ws.plantid = pi.plantid
    WHERE ws.plantid = $plant_name
    GROUP BY ws.plantid, ws.plantname, month, pi.Dccapacity
) w
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
        ig.plantid,
        ig.plantname,
        DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(ig.createddate + 86400), '%Y-%m') AS month,
        SUM(CAST(REPLACE(ig.daygeneration, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_generation
    FROM invgeneration ig
    WHERE ig.plantid = $plant_name
    GROUP BY ig.plantid, ig.plantname, month
) g
ON w.plantid = g.plantid AND w.month = g.month
INNER JOIN plantinfo pi
ON w.plantid = pi.plantid
ORDER BY w.plantname

    FROM weatherstation ws
    INNER JOIN plantinfo pi
        ON ws.plantid = pi.plantid
    WHERE ws.plantid = $plant_name

INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
        ig.plantid,
        ig.plantname,
        DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(ig.createddate + 86400), '%Y') AS year,
        SUM(CAST(REPLACE(ig.daygeneration, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_generation
    FROM invgeneration ig
    WHERE ig.plantid = $plant_name
    GROUP BY ig.plantid, ig.plantname, year
) g
ON w.plantid = g.plantid AND w.year = g.year

SELECT
    w.plantname,
    w.month,
    pi.Dccapacity,
    w.total_dayIrradiation,
    g.total_generation,
    w.Expected_Energy
FROM (
    SELECT
        ws.plantid,
        ws.plantname,
        DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(ws.createddate + 86400), '%Y-%m') AS month,
        SUM(ws.dayIrradiation) AS total_dayIrradiation,
        SUM(ws.dayIrradiation * (pi.Dccapacity * 1000)) AS Expected_Energy
    FROM weatherstation ws
    INNER JOIN plantinfo pi
        ON ws.plantid = pi.plantid
    WHERE ws.plantid = $plant_name
    GROUP BY ws.plantid, ws.plantname, month, pi.Dccapacity
) w
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
        ig.plantid,
        ig.plantname,
        DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(ig.createddate + 86400), '%Y-%m') AS month,
        SUM(ig.daygeneration) AS total_generation
    FROM invgeneration ig
    WHERE ig.plantid = $plant_name
    GROUP BY ig.plantid, ig.plantname, month
) g
ON w.plantid = g.plantid AND w.month = g.month
INNER JOIN plantinfo pi
ON w.plantid = pi.plantid
ORDER BY w.plantname

SELECT
  STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(createddate + 86400), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time,
  devicetype AS inverter,
  SUM(CAST(REPLACE(daygeneration, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS total_generation
FROM invgeneration
WHERE plantid = $plant_name
GROUP BY time, inverter
ORDER BY time, inverter;

SELECT
  STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(createddate + 86400), '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time,
  devicetype AS inverter,
  SUM(CAST(REPLACE(daygeneration, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS total_generation
FROM invgeneration
WHERE plantid = $plant_name
GROUP BY time, inverter
ORDER BY time, inverter;
